news.headline: Norwood Financial Corp releases Q1 2025 financial report, showing strong performance and growth.

news.summary: The marketplace operated by Xometry has resulted in the generation of nearly $1 billion in revenue for small and medium manufacturers in the United States.
news.headline: Xometry's marketplace boosts $1 billion revenue for small and medium manufacturers in America.

ECB: In particular, ECB's interest rate decisions will be based on its assessment of inflation outlook in light of incoming economic and financial data, dynamics of underlying inflation and strength of monetary policy transmition.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, BCT EXP, a prominent player in digital transformation and experience, revealed its acquisition of Krita.ai, a specialized employer brand marketing platform. This strategic move is set to enhance BCT EXP’s AI projects and dedication to delivering smooth experiences, automation, AR/VR, hyper-personalization, agents, and utilizing AI to empower workforces. With the acquisition of Krita.ai, BCT EXP aims to expand its profound domain knowledge in various sectors, such as banking and finance.
news.headline: BCT EXP acquires Krita.ai to boost AI initiatives and enhance user experiences in digital transformation.
ECB Deposit Rate Actual 2.25% (Forecast 2.25%, Previous 2.50%)
ECB Interest Rate Actual 2.4% (Forecast 2.4%, Previous 2.65%)

news.summary: CRH (NYSE: CRH), a top provider of building materials solutions, has named Nancy Buese as their new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting on May 12, 2025. Buese, who will be located in New York, has a strong background in financial leadership at publicly traded companies. Her previous roles include serving as the CFO at Baker Hughes Company and Newmont Corporation. Buese has also held the position of Executive Vice President in the past.
news.headline: CRH appoints Nancy Buese as CFO effective May 12, 2025. She brings experience from Baker Hughes and Newmont Corporation.

news.summary: Almonty Industries Inc. (TSX: AII) (ASX: AII) (OTCQX: ALMTF) (Frankfurt: ALI), a top tungsten concentrate producer, shared that it will be presenting at the 2025 Planet MicroCap Showcase in Las Vegas on April 23-24, 2025. Sophie Frédérique Wind-Veeser, the Business Development and Financial Planning Officer, is set to host a presentation and engage in one-on-one meetings with institutional investors during the event.
news.headline: Almonty Industries to present at Planet MicroCap Showcase on April 23-24, 2025 in Las Vegas, Nevada. Management participating.

news.summary: Westlake Corporation (NYSE: WLK) is set to disclose its first-quarter earnings for 2025 before the market opens on Friday, May 2, 2025. A conference call will be held at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (10:00 a.m. Central Time) on the same day to analyze the earnings report. To participate via phone, registration is required at the following link: https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BIafd8f37a0176451597d9e389828418cf. Upon registration, a phone number will be provided for access.
news.headline: Westlake (NYSE: WLK) to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 2nd, with conference call at 11:00 a.m. ET. Pre-register to access.

news.summary: Improving Fleet Management Efficiency with Data-Driven Strategies ATLANTA - On April 17, 2025, Geotab USA Inc., a renowned provider of connected vehicle and asset solutions, was chosen by the General Services Administration (ASG) of Puerto Rico for their services. The agreement aims to leverage Geotab's expertise to enhance fleet management operations.
news.headline: Puerto Rico government selects Geotab for telematics solutions, enhancing fleet management with data-driven solutions.

news.summary: BMC has joined forces with international partners to deliver top-notch solutions to customers. On April 17, 2025, in Houston, BMC, renowned for its cutting-edge software solutions that accelerate business processes, announced the recipient of the 2025 Solution Provider Partner of the Year award.
news.headline: BMC recognizes 2025 Solution Provider Partners of the Year globally on April 17, 2025.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale has revealed exclusive April promotions on new Mercedes-Benz models. The luxurious dealership in SCOTTSDALE is enticing car enthusiasts with remarkable offers throughout the month. Customers can take advantage of these specials to experience the epitome of luxury driving with Mercedes-Benz vehicles.
news.headline: Mercedes-Benz of Scottsdale in Arizona offering special deals on new vehicles in April 2025. Luxury cars up for grabs.

news.summary: In a recent development on April 17, 2025, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, identified as the leading fully integrated and comprehensive provider of fire protection, life safety, and security services in the United States, announced the acquisition of Arrow Fire Protection, a company based in California. This acquisition serves to strengthen Pye-Barker's position in the market as the largest entity of its kind in the country.
news.headline: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires Arrow Fire Protection in California, strengthening fire safety services. #acquisition

news.summary: In Novara, Italy, on April 17, 2025, Rhino Rescue, a renowned provider of emergency medical solutions worldwide, unveiled the inauguration of its European office. This establishment signifies a key advancement in its dedication to enhancing support for the swiftly expanding European region.
news.headline: Rhino Rescue opens European office in Novara, Italy, to expand regional presence, enhance service in EU.

news.summary: A leading indoor pickleball club franchise, PickleRage, is expanding its presence in Ohio with a cutting-edge facility in Centerville. This latest location, opened by franchisees, signifies the company's dedication to growth. The state-of-the-art center in Centerville will offer top-notch amenities, establishing a strong foothold in the area. The development is part of PickleRage's strategic expansion plan, reflecting the growing popularity of pickleball. The new facility in Centerville demonstrates the company's commitment to providing quality venues for players.
news.headline: PickleRage adds new club in Centerville, OH, growing Ohio presence. Premier indoor pickleball club franchise expanding.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company Cogitate, known for its top technology solutions in the Property and Casualty insurance sector, has recently revealed a new collaboration with LenderDock. LenderDock is a prominent provider of online insurance policy verification and automated lienholder services. This partnership aims to combine Cogitate's expertise with LenderDock's innovative tools to enhance services for clients in the insurance industry. This merger signifies a significant advancement for both companies, showcasing their commitment to driving efficiency and convenience for customers.
news.headline: Cogitate partners with LenderDock to enhance insurance policy verification services in P&C industry.

news.summary: ValidiFI, a renowned company based in ALPHARETTA, Ga., has recently made headlines on April 17, 2025, by revealing their latest developments. The company, known for its expertise in bank account and payment intelligence, has expanded its vAccount+ suite. This expansion introduces advanced features for authoritative bank account verification, providing organizations with enhanced capabilities. Amidst this growth, ValidiFI continues to solidify its position as a leader in the industry, offering innovative solutions to its clients.
news.headline: ValidiFI expands vAccount+ suite with authoritative bank account verification capabilities. Helps organizations verify bank accounts efficiently.

news.summary: VSE Corporation, a major player in Aviation aftermarket distribution and repair services, has revealed that it will release its first quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, after the markets close. Following this, a conference call is scheduled for Wednesday, May 7, 2025, at 8:30 A.M. ET to delve into the financial outcomes, address recent developments, and engage in a Q&A session. Investors and stakeholders can also access a webcast of the conference call for further insights. VSE Corporation trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VSEC.
news.headline: VSE Corporation to announce Q1 2025 results on May 6; conference call on May 7 at 8:30 AM ET.

news.summary: In Xi'an, China, on April 17, 2025, LONGi revealed that it has maintained its AAA rating in PV-Tech's Q1 2025 PV ModuleTech bankability assessment. This achievement signifies LONGi's consistent performance at the highest level for 21 quarters in a row. It highlights the company's ongoing dedication to excellence, innovation, and reliability in the industry.
news.headline: LONGi maintains AAA rating in Q1 2025 PV ModuleTech Bankability Ratings for 21st consecutive quarter.

news.summary: Today, in Wilmington, Delaware, leading experts in the field gathered to combine efforts and support organizations in implementing AI projects securely. The Generative AI Security Project by the Open Worldwide Application Security Project (OWASP) shared that they have added new resources to their website, genai.owasp.org. This initiative aims to assist in enhancing security measures for AI initiatives. The OWASP project is known for its dedication to improving application security worldwide.
news.headline: OWASP Gen AI Security Project gains 9 new sponsors & amps up RSA Conference presence to boost Generative AI Security.

news.summary: In San Diego, a recent study by Strategic Vision highlights the impact of the Trump administration's fluctuating tariff policies on consumers across the country. The constant changes in tariffs, often portrayed as part of the "Art of the Deal," have left consumers feeling uncertain and financially insecure. The study shows that these unpredictable policy shifts have led to a three-way split in consumer behavior: approximately one-third of potential car buyers are hurrying to complete their purchases before any potential price increases.
news.headline: Strategic Vision study shows consumers struggle amid tariff chaos; 1/3 rushing to buy vehicles, feeling financial insecurity
US GDP gets a boost from pre-tariff shopping, with significant increase in spending before tariffs.
Reduced volatility hints at potential gains for energy and tech stocks.
Vietnam to US shipping rates set to soar, warns Bloomberg.

news.summary: Emerita Resources Corp. received a written resolution from the Tribunal Superior De Justicia De Andalucia concerning one of their complaints about the Aznalcóllar public tender. The company, listed as TSX – V: EMO; OTCQB: EMOTF; FSE: LLJA, disclosed this news on April 17, 2025. The resolution from the Court outlines the outcome of Emerita’s complaint related to the administration of the tender. This development signifies a significant progress in resolving the issue, signaling potential changes or updates in the upcoming activities for Emerita Resources Corp.
news.headline: Emerita Resources Corp. updated on Aznalcóllar proceedings; received resolution from Tribunal Superior De Justicia De Andalucia.
Largest market turmoil worsens, causing agony to investors globally.

news.summary: A technology company named SharkNinja, Inc. (NYSE: SN) based in Needham, Mass., disclosed that they will reveal their financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 8, 2025, before the beginning of the market day. Alongside, a live earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on that day. The webcast link will be accessible on the Investor Relations segment of SharkNinja's website at ir.sharkninja.com. To participate in this event, individuals can visit the website.
news.headline: SharkNinja to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 8, 2025, with earnings call at 8:30am ET. Link available on their website.

news.summary: A former UnitedHealth Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) and renowned cybersecurity expert has joined Transcend to provide valuable insights, as the worlds of privacy and security rapidly come together.
news.headline: Transcend names ex-UnitedHealth CISO Aimee Cardwell as 'CISO in Residence' in San Francisco, enhancing cybersecurity expertise.

news.summary: ReSource Pro, a prominent operational partner for insurance companies, has named Paul Naquin as the new Senior Vice President and General Manager of Technology Services. Naquin will oversee a global technology team responsible for providing various services for insurance firms such as system enhancements, cloud implementations, data analytics, AI automation, and more. This appointment signifies the company's dedication to bolstering its technology offerings under Naquin's leadership.
news.headline: Paul Naquin joins ReSource Pro as SVP & GM of Technology Services, to lead a global team offering technology solutions for insurance orgs.

news.summary: MarineMax, Inc. (NYSE: HZO), a global leader in recreational boat and yacht sales, marina operations, and superyacht services, is set to announce its financial performance for the second quarter of the fiscal year 2025 on April 24, 2025. The results will be disclosed before the market opens on the New York Stock Exchange. Following this, at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day, the company will hold a conference call led by Brett McGill, the CEO and President, along with Mike McLamb, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer.
news.headline: MarineMax to announce Q2 fiscal 2025 results on April 24, 2025. Big conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET by CEO & EVP.

news.summary: Montreal-based Explorance has introduced its MTM Blended Learning Module, aimed at transforming the role of measurement in learning and development (L&D) processes. This new tool is designed to enhance the effectiveness of assessing long-term and strategic training programs through features like measurement plan visualizations, cohort performance comparisons, and specialized, standardized surveys. The module provides learning managers with advanced tools to gauge the impact of training more accurately and efficiently.
news.headline: Explorance MTM launches Blended Learning Module, revolutionizing feedback capture in learning. Enhanced tools for measuring training programs effectively.

news.summary: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) based in Hanover, Pennsylvania, a prominent U.S. producer of branded salty snacks, has named William J. Kelley Jr. as the new Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Principal Accounting Officer starting May 1, 2025. Kelley will take over from Ajay Kataria who will be resigning from his role as Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Principal Accounting Officer on the same date. Previously, Kelley held a role in a similar capacity.
news.headline: Utz Brands appoints William J. Kelley Jr. as CFO, replacing Ajay Kataria effective May 1, 2025.

news.summary: In Toronto, Subway® Canada, the country's biggest quick-service restaurant, has introduced the much-awaited Doritos® Footlong Nachos, a tasty collaboration of two renowned brands. The new menu item can be found all across Canada for a restricted period and offers the distinctive crunch of Doritos tortilla chips combined with flavorful Subway ingredients, all for $4*. Known for their love of fresh, top-notch ingredients, Canadians can now enjoy the bold flavors of Subway's latest creation: Doritos Footlong Nachos.
news.headline: Subway Canada partners with Doritos for new Doritos Footlong Nachos, a limited-time item for $4.

news.summary: In Hoboken, NJ, NICE (Nasdaq: NICE) was recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Aragon Research GlobeTM for AI Agent Platforms in the Intelligent Contact Center report. Their CXone Mpower AI platform stood out for effectively managing customer service workflows, agents, and knowledge on a large scale with precision. This resulted in predictive, proactive, and personalized interactions. NICE also launched CXone Mpower Orchestrator, a recent addition to their offerings.
news.headline: NICE recognized as Leader in 2025 Aragon Research GlobeTM for AI Agent Platforms, CXone Mpower AI platform praised for precision and scale.

news.summary: YETI Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: YETI) has disclosed its intention to release first quarter fiscal year 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call will follow at 8:00 a.m. ET for discussions on the financial outcomes. Interested investors and analysts can join by dialing 800-717-1738 (international callers: 646-307-1865) around 10 minutes before the scheduled start time.
news.headline: YETI Holdings, Inc. to report Q1 fiscal 2025 results on May 8, 2025, with conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET. Dial 800-717-1738 to participate.

news.summary: ThinkLP unveiled their latest innovation, AI Crime Linking, as part of their Complex Investigations offering. This advancement aims to further improve their capabilities in analyzing criminal activities.
news.headline: ThinkLP introduces AI Crime Linking to aid retailers in fighting sophisticated crime, part of their Complex Investigations product.

news.summary: Lumentum Holdings Inc., a leading designer and manufacturer of optical and photonic products for various applications, revealed it granted its Chief Transformation Officer, Michael Brooker, equity awards on April 15, 2025. The awards consist of 23,094 restricted stock units (RSUs) tied to Lumentum's common stock, set to vest over time.
news.headline: Lumentum grants equity awards of 23,094 RSUs to Chief Transformation Officer on April 15, 2025.

news.summary: Yamaha Rightwaters has partnered with the Pfleger Institute of Environmental Research (PIER) in Kennesaw, Georgia, to enhance fisheries conservation in North America. PIER, a non-profit organization, connects scientific research with fishery management to promote responsible solutions for resource managers and coastal fishing communities. Yamaha Rightwaters is backing PIER on two main projects, focusing on swordfish movements and sustainable fishing practices. This collaboration aims to strengthen conservation efforts and promote environmental sustainability in North America.
news.headline: Yamaha Rightwaters partners with PIER to support fisheries conservation in North America through education and research.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, DefectDojo revealed the recipients of its first Open-Source Security Awards, acknowledging top open-source security tools aiding AppSec and DevSecOps teams in building robust security programs with limited resources. These awards spotlight tools crucial for achieving strong security postures without hefty budgets. Often, security access is restricted by financial constraints, marginalizing the AppSec sector towards big corporations. The recognition aims to foster diversity in the industry by celebrating tools enabling security for all.
news.headline: DefectDojo awards open-source security tools aiding AppSec teams on tight budget; celebrates AppSec excellence.

news.summary: Officials with the California Department of Food and Agriculture (CDFA) are encouraging residents to remain vigilant and proactive during the gardening season. This advice comes as gardening activities are flourishing across the state.
news.headline: California CDFA urges residents to protect gardens from invasive species during spring gardening season.

news.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS) based in Irvine, California, a company specializing in high-performance analog and mixed-signal semiconductors that enable connections between individuals, locations, and devices, has scheduled a conference call for analysts to review its financial results and future projections for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. This call will take place on May 7, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. EDT. Following the market closing on the same day, Skyworks will release its earnings press release through Business Wire.
news.headline: Skyworks to release Q2 fiscal 2025 results and host conference call on May 7, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. EDT.

news.summary: A global health IT leader, Altera Digital Health, has revealed that Nabla's ambient artificial intelligence (AI) assistant for clinicians is now available for Paragon® Denali clients. This integration is geared towards rural, critical access, and community hospitals utilizing the cloud-native Paragon Denali electronic health record (EHR) platform. By incorporating this AI assistant, providers may potentially save up to two hours of clinical note authoring per day.
news.headline: Altera Digital Health introduces Nabla AI to Paragon Denali hospitals, saving clinicians 2 hours daily.

news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas, NPK International Inc. (NYSE: NPKI) disclosed plans to release its Q1 2025 results post the U.S. market closure on May 1, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for May 2, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. ET to discuss the financial outcomes and engage in a Q&A session. An online broadcast of the call and presentation materials will be accessible in the Investor Relations section.
news.headline: NPK International to release Q1 2025 results on May 1, conference call on May 2 at 9:30 am ET.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, VDE Americas and kWh Analytics have partnered to introduce a new assessment form focusing on solar site hail vulnerability and protective measures. VDE Americas is renowned for providing technical advisory and catastrophic risk assessment services for the solar power sector, while kWh Analytics specializes in Climate Insurance and offers differentiated premiums based on the resiliency of renewable energy assets. This initiative comes as North America's hail season kicks off in April.
news.headline: VDE Americas & kWh Analytics partner to optimize insurance for solar assets against hail damages at the start of North America's hail season.

news.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a green data center developer specializing in Bitcoin mining and AI applications, disclosed that it has secured a power contract for Project Ellen. This initiative involves a 100MW data center situated alongside a 145MW wind farm in South Texas. The wind farm belongs to a prominent renewable energy and sustainable infrastructure company, serving as Soluna's new power partner. The project signifies a notable advancement in Soluna's efforts to expand its operations and promote environmentally friendly computing solutions.
news.headline: Soluna plans to build a new 100MW data center in Texas powered by a 145MW wind farm.(Character count: 76)

news.summary: SuperPlay, an Israeli gaming studio acquired by Playtika, has launched a new game globally on April 17, 2025. This collaboration is the first game release after the acquisition. This marks a significant milestone for SuperPlay, as they join forces with Playtika to expand their reach.
news.headline: SuperPlay reveals new game Disney Solitaire after Playtika acquisition. Global release marks first launch with 10 million players.

news.summary: In Beverly, Massachusetts, on April 17, 2025, Axcelis Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACLS), a prominent supplier of ion implantation solutions for the semiconductor sector, announced they will unveil their financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Tuesday, May 6th. This news provides insight into the company's recent performance and sets the stage for investors and analysts to assess their progress. Stay tuned for further details on their financial standing.
news.headline: Axcelis (Nasdaq: ACLS) to release Q1 2025 results on May 6, before market opening. Leading semiconductor solutions provider.
